description: Claude is Anthropic’s AI assistant and platform for accessing Claude models and managed agent infrastructure. It is available through web and desktop products as well as developer tools for programmatic use.
summary: claude.com exposes Anthropic’s Claude developer surfaces: a REST Claude API at https://api.anthropic.com plus two CLIs (`ant` and `claude`), authenticated with Claude API keys and/or browser login sessions, with Workload Identity Federation also supported for the API and ant CLI.

packages.runtimeHint: Go install mentioned as an option on the quickstart page
